message:
Skip Homebrew in GoReleaser until tap repo is created

The homebrew-tap repository doesn't exist yet. Skip Homebrew publishing
to allow releases to complete successfully.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,8 @@ release:
   name_template: "v{{.Version}}"
 
 brews:
-  - repository:
+  - skip: true # TODO: Create Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap repo to enable Homebrew
+    repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
     directory: Formula
